title: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. TO PRESENT AT MORGAN STANLEY'S 20th ANNUAL GLOBAL HEALTHCARE CONFERENCE
text: KING OF PRUSSIA, Pa. , Sept. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE: UHS) announced today that Steve Filton, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer will participate in a fireside chat at Morgan Stanley's 20th Annual Global Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, September 14, 2022, at 1:30 pm (EDT).

title: Universal Health Services Is A Buy: Here's Why
text: Universal Health Services has a solid balance sheet and history of growing fundamentals. The stock price is depressed due to factors that are temporary for patient investors with reasonable holding periods.
